root_text.sn24.96:1.2: “Kismiṁ nu kho, bhikkhave, sati, kiṁ upādāya, kiṁ abhinivissa evaṁ diṭṭhi uppajjati:
root_text.sn24.96:2.1: “Rūpe kho, bhikkhave, sati, rūpaṁ upādāya, rūpaṁ abhinivissa evaṁ diṭṭhi uppajjati:
root_text.sn24.96:2.6: viññāṇe sati, viññāṇaṁ upādāya, viññāṇaṁ abhinivissa evaṁ diṭṭhi uppajjati:
root_text.sn24.96:3.4: “Yaṁ panāniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vā taṁ sukhaṁ vā”ti?
root_text.sn24.96:3.6: “Yaṁ panāniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vipariṇāmadhammaṁ, kallaṁ nu taṁ samanupassituṁ:
root_text.sn24.96:3.14: “Yaṁ panāniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vā taṁ sukhaṁ vā”ti?
root_text.sn24.96:3.16: “Yaṁ panāniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vipariṇāmadhammaṁ, kallaṁ nu taṁ samanupassituṁ:
root_text.sn24.96:4.1: “Tasmātiha, bhikkhave, yaṁ kiñci rūpaṁ atītānāgatapaccuppannaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā oḷārikaṁ vā sukhumaṁ vā hīnaṁ vā paṇītaṁ vā yaṁ dūre santike vā, sabbaṁ rūpaṁ: ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṁ.
root_text.sn24.96:4.5: yaṁ kiñci viññāṇaṁ atītānāgatapaccuppannaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā, oḷārikaṁ vā sukhumaṁ vā hīnaṁ vā paṇītaṁ vā yaṁ dūre santike vā, sabbaṁ viññāṇaṁ: ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṁ.
root_text.sn24.96:5.1: Evaṁ passaṁ, bhikkhave, sutavā ariyasāvako rūpasmimpi nibbindati, vedanāyapi nibbindati, saññāyapi nibbindati, saṅkhāresupi nibbindati, viññāṇasmimpi nibbindati.
root_text.sn24.96:5.2: Nibbindaṁ virajjati; virāgā vimuccati. Vimuttasmiṁ vimuttamiti ñāṇaṁ hoti.
root_text.sn24.96:5.3: ‘Khīṇā jāti, vusitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ, kataṁ karaṇīyaṁ, nāparaṁ itthattāyā’ti pajānātī”ti.

translation_text.sn24.96:0.3: The Self Is Neither Happy Nor Suffering
translation_text.sn24.96:1.2: “Mendicants, when what exists, because of grasping what and insisting on what, does the view arise:
translation_text.sn24.96:1.3: ‘The self is neither happy nor suffering, and is healthy after death’?”
translation_text.sn24.96:1.4: “Our teachings are rooted in the Buddha. …”
translation_text.sn24.96:2.1: “When form exists, because of grasping form and insisting on form, the view arises:
translation_text.sn24.96:2.2: ‘The self is neither happy nor suffering, and healthy after death.’
translation_text.sn24.96:2.6: consciousness exists, because of grasping consciousness and insisting on consciousness, the view arises:
translation_text.sn24.96:2.7: ‘The self is neither happy nor suffering, and is healthy after death.’
translation_text.sn24.96:3.4: “But if it’s impermanent, is it suffering or happiness?”
translation_text.sn24.96:3.6: “But if it’s impermanent, suffering, and perishable, is it fit to be regarded thus:
translation_text.sn24.96:3.7: ‘This is mine, I am this, this is my self’?”
translation_text.sn24.96:3.14: “But if it’s impermanent, is it suffering or happiness?”
translation_text.sn24.96:3.16: “But if it’s impermanent, suffering, and perishable, is it fit to be regarded thus:
translation_text.sn24.96:3.17: ‘This is mine, I am this, this is my self’?”
translation_text.sn24.96:4.1: “So you should truly see any kind of form at all—past, future, or present; internal or external; solid or subtle; inferior or superior; far or near: all form—with right understanding: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self.’
translation_text.sn24.96:4.2: You should truly see any kind of feeling …
translation_text.sn24.96:4.5: consciousness at all—past, future, or present; internal or external; solid or subtle; inferior or superior; far or near: all consciousness—with right understanding: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self.’
translation_text.sn24.96:5.1: Seeing this, a learned noble disciple grows disillusioned with form, feeling, perception, choices, and consciousness.
translation_text.sn24.96:5.2: Being disillusioned, desire fades away. When desire fades away they’re freed. When they’re freed, they know they’re freed.
translation_text.sn24.96:5.3: They understand: ‘Rebirth is ended, the spiritual journey has been completed, what had to be done has been done, there is nothing further for this place.’”
translation_text.sn24.96:6.5: The Linked Discourses on views are complete.
